controls.summary: Principles relating to processing of personal data (lawfulness, fairness, transparency, purpose limitation, data minimization, accuracy, storage limitation, integrity, accountability).
evidence: PII fields enumerated by the privacy-taint module.

controls.summary: Data protection by design and by default.
evidence: PII annotation runs at scan time, not as an afterthought.

controls.summary: Records of processing activities — controller maintains a register.
evidence: DPIA + privacy-taint annotations cover each PII field with file:line provenance.

controls.summary: Security of processing — appropriate technical and organizational measures.
evidence: Auth-missing findings zero on user-data endpoints.

controls.summary: Notification of personal data breach to the supervisory authority within 72 hours.
evidence: Audit log preserves the breach-window evidence.

controls.summary: Data protection impact assessment (DPIA) for high-risk processing.
